{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136073736?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/tahirsercan", "id": 136073736, "login": "tahirsercan", "node_id": "U_kgDOCBxSCA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/tahirsercan", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54329", "cvss": {"score": 8.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-74", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component ('Injection')"}], "description": "### Impact
A cross-tenant data injection vulnerability was identified in the Snipe-IT Accessories API when Full Multiple Companies Support (FMCS) is enabled. A low-privileged authenticated user belonging to one company can create an accessory record under another company by supplying a foreign company_id value in the API request body.

The issue occurs because the API create path mass-assigns request parameters directly to the Accessory model, and the Accessory model allows company_id to be mass assigned. Unlike the web controller, which uses Company::getIdForCurrentUser() to enforce the authenticated user’s company context, the API controller does not apply equivalent tenant enforcement during accessory creation.

As a result, a Company A user can inject persistent accessory records into Company B. The injected records are then visible to Company B users as legitimate Company B inventory records. This breaks the integrity of company-scoped inventory data and represents a tenant isolation failure in the accessory creation flow.

### Patches
Patched in https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/commit/dc8cbf4786bb38b260b4ae1723ec9e7f81d82fe5", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00389, "percentile": 0.30996}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pwpj-p52h-q484", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T23:12:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pwpj-p52h-q484", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pwpj-p52h-q484"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54329"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T23:12:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/security/advisories/GHSA-pwpj-p52h-q484", "https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/commit/dc8cbf4786bb38b260b4ae1723ec9e7f81d82fe5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pwpj-p52h-q484"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/grokability/snipe-it/security-advisories/GHSA-pwpj-p52h-q484", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it", "summary": "Snipe-IT API Vulnerable to Cross-Tenant Accessory Injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T23:12:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pwpj-p52h-q484", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "8.6.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "snipe/snipe-it"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 8.6.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Snipe-IT API Vulnerable to Cross-Tenant Accessory Injection
